# Agent instructions

This repo uses a single source of truth for agent instructions, commands, and skills: the `.agents/` directory. **Before doing anything else, read [`.agents/AGENTS.md`](.agents/AGENTS.md) and follow its instructions.** That file is the canonical rule set for every agent working in this repo.

`AGENTS.md` is the cross-vendor instruction-file standard. A harness that reads it natively from the repo root — Codex among them — is steered to the source above with no install step. Commands live under `.agents/commands/`, skills under `.agents/skills/`, and conventions and context under `context/`.

This file is an auto-generated pointer produced by `tools/gather.py`; the substantive content lives under `.agents/`. Edits here are overwritten on the next gather.
